markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategy and scope for the Cashflow Desk website experiment.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Goal:** Influence LLM perception of Ramp by building a portfolio of third-party sites, starting with Cashflow Desk.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Strategy:** Validate the model by targeting hyper-specific, zero-competition topics to build initial domain authority, then scale content volume.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
  - [**Execution:** GrowthX will build and host the site to bypass internal red tape. Ramp will provide backlinks from `ramp.com` to accelerate indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3008.0)
  - [**Content:** A "portfolio mix" of informational and brand-driven content will be used. The site will adopt a unique, editorial voice to stand out.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)

## Topics

### Goal & Strategy

  - [**Primary Goal:** Create an "ecosystem" of third-party sites to influence how LLMs perceive and discuss Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)
  - [**Validation Metric:** Citation impact—how Cashflow Desk content affects Ramp's visibility for specific topics in LLM answers.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [**Initial Strategy:** Target hyper-specific, zero-competition long-tail topics.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=963.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This strategy is proven to help new domains get indexed and gain initial traction, which is critical for validation.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
      - [**Example:** Instead of "how to set an annual budget," target "how to set annual budget and growth targets for a construction company."](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**Content Scaling:**](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [Start with a small batch (10–20) of high-quality articles.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Publishing too much content too fast can signal low quality to search engines, hurting indexing.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
      - [Scale volume (e.g., 1→2→3 articles/day) only after validating that initial pages are indexed and receiving impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Audience & Content Mix

  - [**Audience:** Narrow the initial focus from a broad "business owners" persona to a specific niche (e.g., "e-commerce operators").](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A narrow focus is essential to build credibility and compete against established finance content sites.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1572.0)
  - [**Content Mix:** Use a "portfolio mix" to balance credibility and brand promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=767.0)
      - [**Informational Content:** Purely helpful articles on topics like "how to forecast churn."](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [**Brand-Driven Content:** Articles that naturally lead to Ramp's solutions (e.g., "best treasury solutions for startups").](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [**"No-Go" Topics:** Avoid content on "cashback rewards" due to existing LLM hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)

### Execution & Logistics

  - [**Site Build:** GrowthX will build and host the site to bypass internal red tape and accelerate launch. The site will be transferred to Ramp's infrastructure later.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3008.0)
  - [**Design & Branding:**](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
      - [**Inspiration:** The CFO Club (editorial style) and Symbols Magazine (witty voice).](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
      - [GrowthX will create a new brand identity, including a logo and style guide, using the existing Cashflow Desk logo as a starting point.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=2453.0)
  - [**Backlinking Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Primary Driver:** Backlinks from `ramp.com` are the most effective way to accelerate indexing and build initial domain authority.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Secondary Tactics:** GrowthX will explore link exchanges with non-competitive vendors and paid directory submissions.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3219.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ramp:**](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3130.0)
      - [Share a list of affiliate sites (including non-obvious ones) and other reference publications.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
      - [Prepare for cross-linking from `ramp.com` to Cashflow Desk.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3144.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3080.0)
      - [Develop and share the initial strategy document with target personas and content topics.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3080.0)
      - [Begin the site build and brand identity creation.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
      - [Provide updates via Slack and schedule strategic reviews as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/5d-5qazAcumzUctH2H2hQ5-QAwwCV3Xp?tab=summary&timestamp=3080.0)
